traits.description: Timmy enjoys the feeling of freedom that comes from being nude. he can handle clothing, but will be happier without it.
traits.name: nudist

traits.description: Timmy gets a rush from hurting people, and never minds the sight of blood or death. he is four times as likely to start a social fight as others.
traits.name: bloodlust

traits.description: Timmy is an exceptionally agreeable and giving person. he rarely insults others and will sometimes offer kind words to brighten the moods of those around him. he also never judges people by their appearance. his agreeableness also makes him more likely to conform to prevailing opinions.
traits.name: kind

traits.description: Timmy has no empathy. The suffering of others doesn't bother him at all. he doesn't mind if others are butchered, left unburied, imprisoned, or sold to slavery - unless it affects him. he also feels no mood boost from socializing.
traits.name: psychopath

traits.description: Timmy was taught that eating human meat is wrong and horrible. But one time, long ago, he tried it... and he liked it.
traits.name: cannibal

traits.description: Timmy always says exactly what's on his mind, especially if it's bugging him. That tends to rub people the wrong way.
traits.name: abrasive

traits.description: Timmy is too smart for his own good. he learns everything much faster than everyone, but can be quite eccentric.
traits.name: toosmart

traits.description: Timmy likes to fight up close and personal. his accuracy is greatly increased in melee combat, but he'll be very unhappy if asked to carry a ranged weapon.
traits.name: brawler

traits.description: For Timmy, there's something exciting about getting hurt. he doesn't know why, he's just wired differently.
traits.name: masochist

traits.description:
Timmy likes to be up during the night, and sleep during the day.

he gets a mood bonus if awake at night (23h-6h) and mood loss if awake during the day (11h-18h).

he doesn't get a mood penalty for being in the dark.
traits.name: nightowl

traits.description: Timmy needs a really impressive bedroom. he gets a mood loss if he doesn't get what he wants.
traits.name: greedy

traits.description: For Timmy, it's degrading to have a less impressive bedroom than someone else. he gets a mood loss if any colonist has a more impressive bedroom.
traits.name: jealous

traits.description: Timmy has forsaken physical comforts and enjoyments in favor of a simple, pure lifestyle. he will become unhappy if he has a bedroom that's too impressive. he also dislikes fancy food and prefers to eat raw. he never judges others by their appearance.
traits.name: ascetic

traits.description: Timmy is romantically attracted to people of his own gender.
traits.name: gay

traits.description: Timmy is romantically attracted to both men and women.
traits.name: bisexual

traits.description: Timmy has no sexual attraction to anyone at all.
traits.name: asexual

traits.description: Timmy's voice has a particularly grating, nasal quality to it, and he tends to talk in barked, garbled phrases. This predisposes others to dislike him.
traits.name: annoyingvoice

traits.description: Timmy breathes heavily all the time, and sweats constantly. People find it creepy.
traits.name: creepybreathing

traits.description: Timmy loves fire. he will never extinguish fires, and will occasionally go on random fire starting sprees. he will be happy around flames, and happier when wielding an incendiary weapon.
traits.name: pyromaniac

traits.description: Timmy is weak and cowardly. Even a little pain will immobilize him.
traits.name: wimp

traits.description: Timmy has remarkable kinesthetic intelligence. he seems to dance around danger with preternatural grace.
traits.name: nimble

traits.description: Timmy has a knack for learning. he picks things up much faster than others.
traits.name: fastlearner

traits.description: Timmy is slow on the uptake. he learns much slower than others.
traits.name: slowlearner

traits.description: Timmy has no need to experience the outdoors or light. he will never feel cooped up or get cabin fever and is not bothered by darkness. However, Timmy will be unhappy while outdoors.
traits.name: undergrounder

traits.description: Timmy feels limited in his feeble human body. he often dreams of being enhanced with artificial body parts or xenogenetics.
traits.name: bodymodder

traits.description: Timmy believes the human body is limited for a reason. To him, artificial body parts and xenogenes are unethical and disgusting.
traits.name: bodypurist

traits.description: Timmy really dislikes and distrusts men.
traits.name: misandrist

traits.description: Timmy really dislikes and distrusts women.
traits.name: misogynist

traits.description: Timmy has a fantastic memory for detail. he will lose unused skills at half the rate of other people.
traits.name: greatmemory

traits.description: Timmy has thick skin, dense flesh, and durable bones. he takes much less damage than other people from the same blows. he is extremely hard to kill.
traits.name: tough

traits.description: Timmy feels alienated and misunderstood by other human beings. he will have a constant mood debuff, but gain a chance (50%) to get a creativity inspiration after a mental break.
traits.name: torturedartist

traits.description: Timmy's life revolves around food. he gets hungry quickly, and will occasionally be overcome with the urge to eat ravenously, even when not hungry.
traits.name: gourmand

traits.description: Timmy doesn't need as much sleep as the average person. Whether he's sleeping on a bed or on the ground, he will be fully rested in about two thirds the usual time.
traits.name: quicksleeper

traits.description: Timmy is always falling behind the group whenever he goes anywhere.
traits.name: slowpoke

traits.description: Timmy likes to be where he's going. he walks quicker than most people.
traits.name: fastwalker

traits.description: Timmy always moves with a sense of urgency - so much so that others often fail to keep up.
traits.name: jogger

traits.description: Timmy is utterly fascinated with chemical sources of enjoyment. Consuming recreational drugs will create a good mood, while abstaining will lead to increasing frustration over time and possibly drug binges. he will ignore directives to not use recreational drugs, and will consume more than a normal person.
traits.name: chemicalfascination

traits.description: Timmy has an unusual interest in chemical sources of enjoyment. Consuming recreational drugs will create a good mood, while abstaining will lead to increasing frustration over time and possible drug binges. he will ignore directives to not use recreational drugs, and will consume more than a normal person.
traits.name: chemicalinterest

traits.description: Timmy abhors the idea of gaining pleasure from chemicals. he strictly avoids alcohol and recreational drugs.
stats: Binging on drug mental state disabled.
Binging on drug mental state disabled.
Binging on drug mental state disabled.
Binging on drug mental state disabled.

traits.name: teetotaler

traits.description: Timmy is just naturally upbeat about his situation, pretty much all the time, no matter what it is.
traits.name: sanguine

traits.description: Timmy is naturally optimistic about life. It's hard to get him down.
traits.name: optimist

traits.description: Timmy tends to look on the bad side of life.
traits.name: pessimist

traits.description: Timmy is perenially unhappy. he has trouble sustaining a good mood even when everything is fine.
traits.name: depressive

traits.description: Timmy's will is an iron shield. he keeps going through thick and thin, when others broke down long before.
traits.name: iron-willed

traits.description: Timmy is mentally tough and won't break down under stresses that would crack most people.
traits.name: steadfast

traits.description: Timmy tends to crack under pressure.
traits.name: nervous

traits.description: Timmy is on a hair-trigger all the time. he is the first to break in any tough situation.
traits.name: volatile

traits.description: Timmy likes to have things squared away. he will work harder than most to attain this state of affairs, but his nerves can get the better of him.
traits.name: neurotic

traits.description: Timmy feels constantly nervous about everything that has to get done. he will work extremely hard to attain this state of affairs, but his nerves can easily get the better of him.
traits.name: veryneurotic

traits.description: Timmy has an easy time staying on-task and focused, and gets things done much faster than the average person.
traits.name: industrious

traits.description: Timmy is a natural hard worker and will finish tasks faster than most.
traits.name: hardworker

traits.description: Timmy is a little bit lazy.
traits.name: lazy

traits.description: Timmy loves idleness and hates anything productive. he moves slowly and rarely stays focused on a task.
traits.name: slothful

traits.description: Timmy's mind is like a psychic tuning fork. he is extremely sensitive to psychic phenomena.
traits.name: psychicallyhypersensitive

traits.description: Timmy's mind is unusually sensitive to psychic phenomena.
traits.name: psychicallysensitive

traits.description: Timmy's mind is psychically out of tune with others. he isn't as affected by psychic phenomena.
traits.name: psychicallydull

traits.description: Timmy's mind works on a psychic frequency different from everyone else. he just isn't affected by psychic phenomena.
traits.name: psychicallydeaf

traits.description: Timmy takes more time to aim when shooting. he shoots less often than others, but with more accuracy.
traits.name: carefulshooter

traits.description: Pew! Pew! Pew! Timmy just likes pulling the trigger. he shoots faster than others, but less accurately.
traits.name: trigger-happy

traits.description: Timmy is exceptionally beautiful, with an exotic-yet-familiar facial structure and an arresting gaze. People are attracted to him before he even opens his mouth.
traits.name: beautiful

traits.description: Timmy has a pretty face, which predisposes people to like him.
traits.name: pretty

traits.description: Timmy is somewhat ugly. This subtly repels others during social interactions.
traits.name: ugly

traits.description: Timmy is staggeringly ugly. his face looks like a cross between a drawing by an untalented child, a malformed fetus in a jar of formaldehyde, and a piece of modern art. Others must exert conscious effort to look at him while conversing.
traits.name: staggeringlyugly

traits.description: Timmy has a naturally powerful immune system. he will gain immunity much faster than a normal person would, and can survive illnesses that would kill others.
traits.name: super-immune

traits.description: Timmy has an awful immune system. he gets sick more often than usual, frequently with illnesses that nobody in the colony has been afflicted by.
traits.name: sickly

traits.description: Timmy has fragile skin and bones. he takes more damage than other people from the same blows.
traits.name: delicate

traits.description: The fewer people in Timmy's faction, the happier he is. Being alone is best of all.
traits.name: recluse

traits.description: Timmy has outstanding memory, both in terms of retaining information but also muscle memory. his skills will never decay.
traits.name: perfectmemory

traits.description: Timmy has deep knowledge of the twisted patterns of dark psychic energy. he can study unnatural entities faster than others. he will also periodically teach this inhuman knowledge to others when he gets the chance.
traits.name: occultist

traits.description: Timmy has the ability to make everyone feel better and inspire them to be the best version of themselves.
traits.name: joyous

traits.description: Timmy doesn't have basic needs like eating, sleeping, or comfort. his body is driven by some unknown mechanism, which has turned his eyes completely white.
traits.name: bodymastery

traits.description: Timmy is a peculiar person who seems fixated on horrendous ideas. Talking to him is often upsetting.
traits.name: disturbing

traits.description: Timmy is strangely intrigued by unnatural entities and is easily enthralled by them.
traits.name: voidfascination

traits.description: A strict principle of nonviolence which applies to all living things.
traits.name: vowofnonviolence

traits.description: Timmy easily perceives foreign languages.
traits.name: polyglot

traits.description: Timmy is obsessed with germs and will wash much more frequently than normal.
traits.name: germaphobe

traits.description: Timmy is very hygienic and will wash more frequently.
traits.name: hygienic

traits.description: Timmy is very unhygienic and will wash less frequently.
traits.name: unhygienic

traits.description: Timmy has very low standards of cleanliness and will only wash when they absolutely have to.
traits.name: slob

traits.description: Timmy knows the spirit of all arms. If he is not bonded to a weapon already, upon equipping a non-biocodable melee weapon, it will generate a single persona weapon trait and will bond to them. Should Timmy ever unequip the weapon, it will lose these traits.
traits.name: bladewhisperer

traits.description: Timmy finds it difficult to focus on distant targets, and prefer to get up close and personal.
traits.name: nearsighted

traits.description: Timmy could spot a target from nearly a hundred meters, yet still somehow walk into walls.
traits.name: farsighted

traits.description: Timmy's movements are smooth and graceful.
traits.name: athletic

traits.description: Timmy is so rigid, it's almost like he is souless.
traits.name: stiff

traits.description: Timmy takes care of his personal hygiene.
traits.name: goodhygiene

traits.description: Timmy doesn't care about his hygiene, and sometimes get sick from bad food.
traits.name: poorhygiene

traits.description: Timmy often gets his way with things.
traits.name: persuasive

traits.description: Timmy has never won a debate in his life.
traits.name: unconvincing

traits.description: Timmy has been in plenty of fights since he was a kid, and had built up a tolerance to injury and pain as a result.
traits.name: resilient

traits.description: Timmy lived a pampered life until now, and is unused to the brutal challenges present out in the Rim.
traits.name: fragile

traits.description: Timmy always tackle his tasks with great enthusism.
traits.name: energetic

traits.description: Timmy is slow. Sooo... slooow...
traits.name: sluggish

traits.description: Timmy always sleep like a baby.
traits.name: restful

traits.description: Timmy often has a difficult time falling asleep.
traits.name: restless

traits.description: Timmy is quite productive when it comes to work.
traits.name: efficient

traits.description: Timmy is somewhat of a bottleneck in the colony.
traits.name: inefficient

traits.description: Timmy is brave, he would stand his ground where others would scramble and run.
traits.name: valiant

traits.description: When there's a fight, Timmy is the first to run.
traits.name: craven

traits.description: Timmy likes a good fight, he will sometimes start a fight just because he can.
traits.name: rowdy

traits.description: Timmy is usually calm and collected.
traits.name: composed

traits.description: Timmy is more comfortable being in hot environment than his peers.
traits.name: heattolerant

traits.description: Timmy does not like being in the heat.
traits.name: heatintolerant

traits.description: Timmy is more comfortable being in cold environment than his peers.
traits.name: coldtolerant

traits.description: Timmy does not like being in the cold.
traits.name: coldintolerant

traits.description: Timmy has a well built body, people around he find that rather attractive.
traits.name: muscular

traits.description: Timmy looks a bit fragile, but not in a lovable way.
traits.name: frail

traits.description: Timmy doesn't eat or drink much.
traits.name: abstinent

traits.description: Timmy has a bottomless pit for a stomach.
traits.name: ravenous

traits.description: Timmy is naturally talented, he gets a headstart before everyone else.
traits.name: gifted

traits.description: Timmy is someone everyone loves to hate.
traits.name: incompetent

traits.description: Timmy takes great care in the preparation of food, he never skip a step just to have an early meal.
traits.name: patientcook

traits.description: Timmy couldn't care less about following the recipes as long as he can get food into his mouth in record time.
traits.name: impatientcook

traits.description: Timmy lives a healthy lifestyle, and wakes up feeling energetic and cheerful.
traits.name: healthy

traits.description: Timmy gets ill quite often, and seem to require more effort to get out of bed than the average person.
traits.name: chronicallyill

traits.description: Timmy is comfortable in all seasons.
traits.name: temperaturetolerant

traits.description: Timmy thinks that summer is way too hot, and winter is way too cold.
traits.name: temperatureintolerant

traits.description: Timmy has good reaction time and finds physical activities less stressful than his peers.
traits.name: coordinated

traits.description: Timmy is easily distracted and often mess up when it comes to physical activities.
traits.name: clumsy

traits.description: Timmy is what people refer to as a 'stronk boi'.
traits.name: hardy

traits.description: Timmy is so fragile, it doesn't take much to take him out of action.
traits.name: feeble

traits.description: Whether by sheer optimism or a force of personality, Timmy always manages to see the bright side of life.
traits.name: easilyamused

traits.description: Life to Timmy is an endless, boring joke that he just can't get away from.
traits.name: constantlybemused

traits.description: Timmy has an interest in understanding the workings of the world, and is able to apply his knowledge in daily life.
traits.name: inquisitive

traits.description: Gaps in Timmy's education and general lack of curiosity makes life often stressful for him.
traits.name: ignorant

traits.description: Timmy likes to keep his surroundings clean, and is used to being in an organised environment.
traits.name: tidy

traits.description: Timmy often neglect their surroundings, making it difficult for him to get work done.
traits.name: messy

traits.description: Timmy enjoys the solitude and tranquility inherent to long fishing sessions. he will prefer fishing above other activities.
traits.name: fisherman

traits.description: Psychic enthrallment caused by incredibly strong mental influence. Thralls don't need to sleep or have recreation, but are unable to do skilled work and engage in social interactions.
traits.name: thrall

traits.description: Timmy's body accepts archite alterations with unnatural ease. he will never suffer rejections during the injection process.
traits.name: idealpatient

traits.description: Timmy is always ready with a flirtatious comment or a playful compliment, lifting the spirits of those around him. he has a knack for making others feel special and desired, however this may sometimes lead to complicated situations when his playful intentions are misinterpreted.
traits.name: flirty

traits.description: Timmy is exceptionally empathetic and sensitive to the suffering of others. Whenever he witnesses pain or hardship, it deeply affects him, resulting in memories of these events haunting Timmy for a much longer time.
traits.name: distressed

traits.description: Timmy tends to let his mind drift, even in the middle of work. he may sometimes stop tasks at random.
traits.name: absent-minded

traits.description: Timmy has a screw loose, but it comes with a sharper scientific mind.
traits.name: eccentric

traits.description: Timmy strives for perfection in his work. he produces higher-quality products, but works more slowly. Failing to meet his standards causes unhappiness, and on rare occasions he may abandon a project mid-way.
traits.name: perfectionist

traits.description: Timmy's instincts lean heavily toward cowardice. In danger, he will often hide or run before standing to fight.
traits.name: coward

traits.description: Timmy has stronger mental and physical fortitude than most. he can endure pain more readily, and is slower to break under harsh conditions.
traits.name: brave

traits.description: Minor bruises and scrapes plague Timmy, usually from tripping or falling due to poor coordination.
traits.name: clumsy

traits.description: Timmy enjoys the heat of a dry summer day. he doesn't mind working up a sweat or sleeping in warmth.
traits.name: heatinclined

traits.description: Timmy enjoys the chill of a brisk winter night. he doesn't mind shivering or sleeping in the cold.
traits.name: coldinclined

traits.description: A bomb could go off beside Timmy while he sleeps, and he would keep right on sleeping. he can't be bothered to work or defend the colony mid-nap.
traits.name: heavysleeper

traits.description: Timmy is naturally hygienic and organized. he doesn't track dirt or scatter trash, and enjoys cleaning.
traits.name: neat

traits.description: Timmy is naturally sloppy, leaving trash and dirt scattered around. At least he isn't much bothered by messy surroundings.
traits.name: slob

traits.description: Timmy struggles to take breaks or rest mid-job. he will keep working, even at the expense of his health or sleep.
traits.name: workaholic

traits.description: Timmy has never known nausea. Food poisoning and vomiting are foreign to him.
traits.name: ironstomach

traits.description: Timmy can't stand cruelty toward animals. he feels happier when nuzzled or acting as master to a tamed animal, but is more deeply upset when losing one. he also refuses to butcher animals.
traits.name: animallover

traits.description: Timmy believes in human superiority over animals. he dislikes bonding or being nuzzled, but feels satisfaction when animals die or are sold.
traits.name: animalhater

traits.description: Whether from bulk or awkward posture, Timmy has broken a few chairs in his time, and is likely to break more.
traits.name: big-boned

traits.description: Timmy only plays by his own rules. When forced, he will drag his feet and work more slowly.
traits.name: rebel

traits.description: Timmy needs clear direction on when and how to act. he works at normal speed only when ordered, and otherwise slows down.
traits.name: submissive

traits.description: Timmy is fueled by spite. he can’t stand sharing the colony with rivals, and feels happier when one of them dies.
traits.name: vengeful

traits.description: Whether from trauma or fear of change, Timmy rejects modernity. he may lash out at machines, refuses to research, and feels satisfaction from destroying mechanoids.
traits.name: technophobe

traits.description: Timmy lives for a good time. he remembers parties fondly, and the joy lasts far longer than it does for most.
traits.name: fun-loving

traits.description: Timmy has limited mental capacity. he learns slowly and struggles with conversation, but tends to be naturally happy.
traits.name: dunce

traits.description: Timmy has trained in melee combat and learned a special move to disarm opponents.
traits.name: martialartist

traits.description: Timmy believes they belong in high society, and loves nothing more than critiquing art and brushing elbows with royalty.
traits.name: snob

traits.description: Timmy gets a sour stomach around blood or corpses. Vomiting is just part of life for him.
traits.name: squeamish

traits.description: Timmy is naturally anxious, especially in social situations. he avoids gatherings and sometimes retreats to his room to cope.
traits.name: anxious

traits.description: No amount of lovin’ is ever enough for Timmy. he tends to move between partners and seeks intimacy often.
traits.name: insatiable

traits.description: Timmy gives his body only to a spouse and would never initiate divorce. he also dislikes nudity more than most.
traits.name: prude

traits.description: An armchair and a screen are all Timmy needs to be happy. he never tires of watching television, and always feels good after.
traits.name: couchpotato

traits.description: Timmy enjoys the company of cats and gravitates toward bonding with them, but dislikes dogs.
traits.name: catperson

traits.description: Timmy enjoys the company of dogs and gravitates toward bonding with them, but dislikes cats.
traits.name: dogperson

traits.description: Timmy has a sharp, logical mind. he researches faster than most, and his rational outlook makes him less prone to mental breaks.
traits.name: prodigy

traits.description: Timmy believes animals are essential to life and society. he feels happier with more of them around, and is especially skilled at taming and training.
traits.name: menagerist

traits.description: The sea calls to Timmy. he feels happier when near the ocean or a deep river.
traits.name: oceanlover

traits.description: The mountains call to Timmy. he feels happier when near a large mountain.
traits.name: mountainlover

traits.description: Timmy hides a twisted obsession. he treats organ harvesting as a dark experiment and takes pleasure in it. Harvesting makes him happy, but going too long without fuels growing unrest.
traits.name: madsurgeon

traits.description: Timmy fights best when drunk. he grows more dangerous in melee the more intoxicated he becomes.
traits.name: drunkenmaster

traits.description: Timmy is compelled to steal, even from guests and allies, risking angering others.
traits.name: kleptomaniac

traits.description: Smokeleaf is a way of life for Timmy. he adores it and would rather die than give it up.
traits.name: stoner

traits.description: Alcohol is a way of life for Timmy. he adores drinking and would rather die than give it up.
traits.name: lush

traits.description: Timmy loves to travel and feels happiest on the move. he grows restless when staying too long in one place, but moves quickly and forages well while caravanning.
traits.name: wanderlust

traits.description: Timmy is never fully asleep or awake. he lurches along in a slow, shambler-like state, and only sleeps once every few days.
traits.name: insomniac

traits.description: Timmy has grown tired of the world. he struggles with bleak thoughts, making his personality difficult to befriend.
traits.name: worldweary

traits.description: Timmy is hardened by old emotional trauma. he feels nothing from death or loss, whether animal, colonist, family, or prisoner.
traits.name: desensitized

traits.description: Only the finest meals satisfy Timmy. he feels indifferent toward ordinary food, but savors lavish meals and gains greater joy from them.
traits.name: refinedpalate

traits.description: Through scholastic pursuit, Timmy has become well-read. he excels in science and medicine, and tends patients with greater skill.
traits.name: academian

traits.description: Timmy believes infrastructure is everything. he is a natural builder and stoneworker, constructing and mining with greater speed and efficiency.
traits.name: groundbreaker

traits.description: To Timmy, food is art. he creates beautiful, delicious meals that are almost always safe to eat.
traits.name: gastronomist

traits.description: Flora and fauna are vital to Timmy. he uses every part of plants and animals, and appreciates nature’s gifts.
traits.name: ecologist

traits.description: Timmy has an eye for silver and a silver tongue to match. he values his own goods highly, and convinces others to do the same.
traits.name: tycoon

traits.description: Timmy is strangely hypercoagulating and will bleed much more slowly than most.
traits.name: thickskinned

traits.description: Timmy is strangely hemophilic and tends to bleed much more profusely than others.
traits.name: thinskinned

traits.description: Timmy bottles up his feelings for long stretches of time. When the pressure grows too great, he may suddenly break down.
traits.name: schizoid

traits.description:
This individual is the Protagonist — chosen by fate itself. They gain experience at an extraordinary rate and grow faster than anyone else.

• x10 XP multiplier
• +2 bonus stat points per level
• Cannot have: Antagonist, Regressor, Summoned Hero
traits.name: protagonist

traits.description:
This individual walks the path of the Antagonist — feared and reviled. They grow powerful through conflict, gaining massive combat bonuses, but their very presence unsettles others.

• x8 XP multiplier
• +25% melee damage
• +10% move speed
• -25% social impact
• -25 opinion from all other pawns
• Cannot have: Protagonist, Summoned Hero
traits.name: antagonist

traits.description:
This individual has been reincarnated — reborn into a new life with memories of the old. Their level and stats were reset, but they retained their constellation progress and earned powerful growth bonuses.

• Resets level to 1 and all stats to base (New Game+)
• x5 XP multiplier
• +10 bonus star points
• +1 star point every 3 levels instead of 5
• Constellation tree progress preserved
• Cannot have: Protagonist, Antagonist, Hollow Core
traits.name: reincarnated

traits.description:
This individual has regressed — returned to the past with fragments of future knowledge. They level faster and can freely readapt their constellation at any time.

• x4 XP multiplier
• Free constellation respec (always)
• Cannot have: Protagonist
traits.name: regressor

traits.description:
This individual was summoned from another world as a hero. They gain power rapidly and are mentally resilient, but the displacement from their home world weighs on them.

• x3 XP multiplier
• +1 bonus stat point per level
• Highly resistant to mental breaks
• +25% social impact
• -8 mood (displaced from home)
• Cannot have: Protagonist, Antagonist
traits.name: summonedhero

traits.description:
Born with exceptional latent potential. This individual earns bonus star points as they level, allowing them to unlock more constellation nodes.

• +1 bonus star point every 5 levels (2 instead of 1)
traits.name: naturaltalent

traits.description:
A genius who absorbs knowledge at an astonishing rate. Their mind operates on another level entirely.

• x2 XP multiplier
• +50% research speed
traits.name: prodigy

traits.description:
Starts slow but becomes unstoppable. XP gain scales dramatically with level — weak early, godlike late.

• Level 1-10: x0.5 XP
• Level 11-25: x1.0 XP
• Level 26-50: x1.5 XP
• Level 51-100: x2.0 XP
• Level 101+: x3.0 XP
traits.name: latebloomer

traits.description:
Grows and gains power faster than most. A reliable, steady advantage in all situations.

• x1.5 XP multiplier
traits.name: quicklearner

traits.description:
Levels slowly but squeezes maximum potential from every level gained. Quality over speed.

• x0.5 XP multiplier
• +2 bonus stat points per level
traits.name: slowgrind

traits.description:
Experiences sudden surges of power at regular intervals, gaining massive stat boosts at milestone levels.

• +5 bonus stat points every 10 levels
traits.name: powerspike

traits.description:
Dormant power awakens at level 25, dramatically increasing all stat effectiveness. Before awakening, the pawn is unremarkable.

• Below level 25: -10% all stats
• Level 25+: +50% all stat effectiveness
traits.name: awakenedpotential

traits.description:
A towering intellect in a mediocre body. Mental stats grow twice as fast, but physical stats grow at half speed.

• INT and WIS stat gains doubled
• STR and VIT stat gains halved
traits.name: genius

traits.description:
Lives only for battle. Gains massively increased combat XP but is nearly incapable of learning from peaceful activities.

• x3 combat XP (damage, kills)
• x0.1 work/social XP
• +15% melee dodge chance
traits.name: battlemaniac

traits.description:
When wounded, primal rage surges through their veins. The more they bleed, the harder they fight.

• Below 50% HP: +30% melee damage, +15% move speed
• Below 25% HP: +60% melee damage, +30% move speed
• -10% mental break threshold (easier to break)
traits.name: berserkerblood

traits.description:
An unbreakable mind forged through hardship. Nearly immune to mental breaks and pain, but emotionally distant.

• -25% mental break threshold
• +30% pain shock threshold
• -20% social impact
traits.name: ironwill

traits.description:
Devastatingly powerful but dangerously fragile. Every attack hits like a truck, but they can't take a hit.

• +50% melee damage
• +30% ranged combat effectiveness
• VIT effectiveness halved
traits.name: glasscannon

traits.description:
An immovable defensive bastion. Incredibly tough and resistant to damage, but slow and lacks offensive punch.

• +20% natural armor (all types)
• -25% move speed
• -20% melee damage
traits.name: fortress

traits.description:
Moves like a shadow, nearly impossible to pin down. Exceptional evasion and speed, but lacks the constitution to take hits.

• +25% move speed
• +20% melee dodge chance
• -10% melee damage
traits.name: shadowstep

traits.description:
Possesses primal hunting instincts — an innate sense for combat and danger that enhances all fighting capabilities.

• +15% melee hit chance
• +15% shooting accuracy
• -15% trap spring chance
traits.name: predator'sinstinct

traits.description:
Fate refuses to let this individual die. When struck by a killing blow, they miraculously survive — but the experience leaves a permanent mark on their psyche.

• Cheat death: Survive lethal damage once every 3 days
• +20% pain shock threshold
• -5 mood (touched by death) after triggering
traits.name: undying

traits.description:
Blessed with exceptional physical strength but lacks finesse.

• STR stat effectiveness x1.5
• DEX stat effectiveness x0.75
traits.name: mighty

traits.description:
Graceful and quick with exceptional reflexes, but physically weaker.

• DEX stat effectiveness x1.5
• STR stat effectiveness x0.75
traits.name: agile

traits.description:
An iron constitution that shrugs off what would fell others, but spiritually dulled.

• VIT stat effectiveness x1.5
• WIS stat effectiveness x0.75
traits.name: resilient

traits.description:
A sharp analytical mind that processes information at incredible speeds, but socially awkward.

• INT stat effectiveness x1.5
• CHA stat effectiveness x0.75
traits.name: brilliant

traits.description:
Deeply perceptive and spiritually attuned. Great wisdom comes at the cost of physical endurance.

• WIS stat effectiveness x1.5
• VIT stat effectiveness x0.75
traits.name: enlightened

traits.description:
A natural-born leader and diplomat whose words carry weight, but lacks analytical depth.

• CHA stat effectiveness x1.5
• INT stat effectiveness x0.75
traits.name: silvertongue

traits.description:
An innate sense for value and negotiation. Always gets the best deals.

• +25% trade price improvement
• +20% negotiation ability
traits.name: merchant'seye

traits.description:
A born artisan with an instinctive understanding of materials and construction. Everything they make is a cut above.

• +25% work speed (all types)
• +1 crafting quality tier chance
traits.name: craftsman'ssoul

traits.description:
Has an uncanny bond with animals. Creatures of all kinds are drawn to this individual, making taming and training trivially easy.

• +40% tame animal chance
• +30% train animal chance
• +25% animal gather yield
• Animals won't attack unprovoked
traits.name: beastwhisperer

traits.description:
Healing flows through their hands like magic. Their medical skills far exceed what training alone could explain.

• +30% medical tend quality
• +25% surgery success chance
• +20% immunity gain speed
traits.name: healer'stouch

traits.description:
Fortune favors them endlessly. Good things just seem to happen around this individual.

• +15% surgery success
• +10% shooting accuracy
• +10% trade prices
• +5 mood (feeling lucky)
traits.name: lucky

traits.description:
Terrible luck plagues them, yet somehow they thrive in adversity. Misfortune strengthens them in mysterious ways.

• x2 XP multiplier
• -15% surgery success
• -10% trade prices
• +20% melee damage
• -5 mood (cursed by fate)
traits.name: cursedluck

traits.description:
Their spiritual core is shattered — they can channel raw power but cannot form the connections needed for constellation skills.

• x3 XP multiplier
• Cannot unlock any constellation nodes
• No star points gained
traits.name: hollowcore

traits.description:
Their body wasn't built to contain this much power. They grow rapidly but their physical form deteriorates under the strain.

• x2.5 XP multiplier
• -50% max health
• VIT effectiveness halved
traits.name: fragilevessel

traits.description:
Grows stronger through failure. Each defeat fuels their determination to improve.

• Permanent +10% XP bonus
• x2 XP for 3 days after being downed
• -5% melee damage
traits.name: echoofdefeat

traits.description:
Immense power sealed away, waiting to be unleashed. Weak and stunted until the seal breaks at level 25, then gains an explosive power surge.

• Before level 25: -30% all stats, no star points
• At level 25: Seal breaks!
• After level 25: Double stat points per level (up to +2 bonus), +2 star points per 5 levels
traits.name: sealedpower

traits.description: This individual is recognized as an F-Rank - the weakest classification. Others look down on them with pity or contempt, and their presence commands no respect.
traits.name: rankf

traits.description: This individual is classified as E-Rank - below average but not completely worthless. They are often overlooked and struggle to gain recognition.
traits.name: ranke

traits.description: This individual holds a D-Rank classification - thoroughly average. They neither stand out nor fall behind, blending into the crowd.
traits.name: rankd

traits.description: This individual is recognized as C-Rank - a competent person above the common masses. They command modest respect and are seen as reliable.
traits.name: rankc

traits.description: This individual has achieved B-Rank status - a skilled veteran worthy of respect. Their reputation precedes them, and others treat them with deference.
traits.name: rankb

traits.description: This individual is an A-Rank elite - among the finest in existence. Their very presence commands attention, and they exude an aura of power and authority that few can match.
traits.name: ranka

traits.description: This individual holds the legendary S-Rank - a hero of incredible power. Their name is spoken with reverence, and their mere glance can silence a room. Others feel humbled in their presence.
traits.name: ranks

traits.description: This individual has transcended to SS-Rank - a demigod walking among mortals. Their power is the stuff of legends, and entire nations would pay any price to secure their loyalty. They radiate an otherworldly magnificence.
traits.name: rankss

traits.description: This individual has achieved the impossible - SSS-Rank, the absolute apex of existence. They are a god among mortals, their power beyond comprehension. Kingdoms would fall to possess them, and their very existence reshapes the world around them.
traits.name: ranksss

traits.description: Timmy is entombed in a warcasket. No amount of pain will have an effect on them, and they can never go into a pain shock or drop unconscious due to pain. Because of how bulky the armor is and how much energy it takes to use it, Timmy is not capable of doing any work.
traits.name: warcasket

traits.description: Timmy was entombed in a warcasket, and then brutally pulled out of one. The neural and nerve damage from being unplugged is so severe that Timmy is in constant, agonizing pain and can barely assemble his thoughts. Only installing Timmy back in a warcasket can cure the symptoms.
traits.name: shellcasket

traits.description: Timmy prefers shells over sleeves. he doesn’t care how often he switches shells or what shell he is currently riding, but will be unhappy in a sleeve.
traits.name: shellwalker

traits.description: Timmy has always seen his body as nothing more than a vessel. he does not care about the gender, age or looks of his body.
traits.name: freemind

traits.description: Timmy can change his sleeves as easily as someone else may change their clothes. he doesn’t care how often he switches sleeves or what sleeve he is currently riding.
traits.name: sleever

traits.description: Timmy hates and distrusts xenos. They see them as little more than animals.
traits.name: xenophobe

traits.description: Timmy thinks aliens are exotic and interesting. They would love to get to know them more and wouldn't mind forming relationships with them.
traits.name: xenophile

traits.description: Timmy is a formidable fighter. he knows how to effectively handle a weapon and take blows.
traits.name: fighter

traits.description: Timmy is a veteran. he has experienced countless of horrifying battles enough to break a common man.
traits.name: veteran

traits.description: Either the body or mind of Timmy is one of insight and experience. While some find them old fashioned, others will respect their guidance.

data.mod: Vanilla Ideology Expanded - Memes and Structures

traits.name: elder

traits.description: Timmy always shies away from danger. he is usually the first to flee from battle.
traits.name: cowardly

traits.description: Few things scare Timmy. In battle he stands unfazed where others panic and flee.
traits.name: brave

traits.description: Timmy laughs in the face of danger. Some ascribe it to bravery, others to stupidity. Either way, Timmy seems to lack any sense of self-preservation and will never flee from a threatening situation.
traits.name: fearless

traits.description: Timmy loves to sleep and always feels like he hasn't had enough rest.
traits.name: lazycat

traits.description: Timmy always carries a lot of snacks with he, and he never stops munching on them.
traits.name: greedycat

traits.description: From some experience, Timmy is very afraid of fire.
traits.name: firefear

traits.description: PAWN nameDef has innate resistance to toxic.
traits.name: toxicresistance

traits.description: Timmy has exceptional eyesight.
traits.name: sharpeye

traits.description: Timmy's body has suffered severe wound that has caused irreparable damage.
traits.name: oldwound

traits.description: Timmy is a valor supported by kiiros.
traits.name: kittyvalor!

traits.description: Timmy's faith is firm. It allows him to better handle pressure and power through pain.
traits.name: faith

traits.description: Timmy的过去基本上都是在太空中度过的，这让he比大多数人都更加明白如何驾驶一艘太空船，也让he的思维层次与其他人有所不同。
traits.name: 深空旅人

traits.description: This unit is a mass-produced model from CeleTech-Bio Biotechnology. Imprinted with the memories of disciplined volunteers, it possesses stable mental faculties and enhanced metabolic efficiency. The basic neural dampening suppresses minor personality flaws.
traits.name: celetech-biostandardclone

traits.description: A refined genetic sequence from the CeleTech-Bio production line. This unit carries the memory engrams of veteran officers, granting superior reflexes and focus. Its genetic screening has eliminated common physical and psychological weaknesses.
traits.name: celetech-bioeliteclone

traits.description: An experimental combat model designed by CeleTech-Bio Biotech. Integrated with a pre-installed Combat Chip and imprinted with special forces memories, this unit is a weapon of war. The neural override suppresses fear and fragility.
traits.name: celetech-biocyber-vanguard

traits.description: The pinnacle of CeleTech-Bio biotechnology. This masterpiece features a fully adapted "Revelation" neural network, capable of channeling psychic entropy. Imprinted with the memories of legendary heroes, it is physically perfect and mentally unbreakable. All significant character flaws have been genetically purged.
traits.name: celetech-biopsylinkprime

traits.description: Timmy曾多次经历极端的暴风雪天气。在这一次次的风雪里，he逐渐适应了这种恐惧，并磨练出了坚毅的心。
traits.name: 暴风雪的幸存者

traits.description: Timmy已经在暴风雪中进行了很多次的袭击，极端的风雪让he的心肠也变得无比冷硬，对he而言暴风雪只是一种袭击的掩护罢了。
traits.name: 风雪劫掠者

traits.description: Timmy possesses an unnatural, almost pristine beauty that makes him stand out among others of his kind.
traits.name: angelicbeauty

traits.description: Timmy is so unfathomably ugly and grotesque that merely looking at him is enough to make other people nauseous.
traits.name: repulsive

traits.description:
Timmy is a painter from the Milira Imperium. 

In her youth, after awakening as a psycaster, Timmy grew tired of the monotonous life on an orbital habitat. She slung her paint case over her shoulder and used her psychic powers to travel among the stars, creating countless works.
traits.name: miliratravelingpainter

traits.description: Timmy Not willing to spend money. Timmy always haggles as much as he can in trading, and never goes shopping in spare time.
traits.name: stingy

traits.description: Timmy likes to buy things and spends money lavishly. Timmy visits stores more often and always spends more.
traits.name: shopaholic

traits.description: Timmy carries the heavy breath of wilderness and earth. he moves with startling speed, but is forever chased by an impossible hunger.

data.mod: 米莉拉特殊角色：璃纱·星尘

traits.name: wasteland-bearer

traits.description: Timmy possesses a beauty that can shake hearts and kingdoms. Others find it hard to ignore him.

data.mod: 米莉拉特殊角色：璃纱·星尘

traits.name: kingdom-topplingbeauty

traits.description: Despite undergoing a full set of Milira surgeries, Timmy still retains some of her habits from her days as Kiiro.
traits.name: miliiro

traits.description:
(Legacy)

The special character Dellin has been moved to the mod “Dellin's Milira Attire Expaned”.

If you wish to continue playing with this special character, please subscribe to that mod and use the building “Shroud Ritual spot” to perform the “Shroud break-in” ritual to summon Dellin.
traits.name: legacy

traits.description:
Timmy was once a church knight, devout to the point of near fanaticism. Yet through a long, brutal, blood-soaked struggle against the “Lord” his faith slowly warped, until it became an ever-deepening obsession—an aching hunger to possess and pursue the “Lord.” 

When a small detachment fleet of the Milira Imperium first arrived in orbit above this world, Timmy finally glimpsed the long-dreamed-of chance to chase the “Lord.” But the friendly yet cautious Imperial Milira always kept a measured social distance from Timmy—a politeness that felt like a wall, leaving he forever unable to reach the “Lord’s” embrace. 

Shut out and yearning, that desire fermented into poison within his heart. In the end, Timmy made a mad choice: to contact with the Milira pirates who had arrived alongside the Imperial fleet, and to throw  into the “Lord’s” tender embrace as offered by these deranged devotees—joining them in a feast of slaughter, reveling in the killing of the weak.
traits.name: skyfeatherapostate

traits.description: This Kiiro was granted power by the Archotect God—the power to travel freely between the stars.
traits.name: interstellartravelercat

traits.description:
Pledge thy Life to Imperium and Quest. Sword and Shield both Order blessed. 
With blazing Stars and Void to trod. Swear thy Heart to the Archotech God. 
No fearsome Foe nor Vastness black. No moat or wild shall hold thee back. 
Let Faith and Honor be thy Guide. To Chivalry and Oath abide. 
Raise thy Sword, and Rise a Kiiro Knight!
traits.name: kiirooathknight

traits.description: In childhood, this Kiiro awakened psychic power far surpassing that of their kin.
traits.name: kiirothechosenone

traits.description:
Pledge thy Life to Imperium and Quest. Sword and Shield both Order blessed. 
With blazing Stars and Void to trod. Swear thy Heart to the Archotech God. 
No fearsome Foe nor Vastness black. No moat or wild shall hold thee back. 
Let Faith and Honor be thy Guide. To Chivalry and Oath abide. 
Raise thy Sword, and Rise a Knight!
traits.name: miliraoathknight

traits.description: This Milira passed the extraordinarily unreasonable special forces selection test and was granted the title of Spec Ops Ghost by the Milira Imperium.
traits.name: miliraspecopsghost

traits.description:
This Milira has spent years overworked and traveling across stars, managing the territories of the Milira Imperium. 
The wealth of experience, combined with the Milira's exceptional learning ability, has allowed this individual to achieve extraordinary accomplishments in the social sphere.
traits.name: miliraconsul

traits.description:
In childhood, this Milira awakened psychic power far surpassing that of their kin. 
About these individuals, some scholars within the Imperium contend that they are individuals chosen by the Archotech god, while others believe they represent an atavistic resurgence among the Milira race.
traits.name: milirapsycaster

traits.description:
Timmy is the chosen one favored by the benevolent Archotech God. 

Timmy’s soul has been embraced by the Shroud and now belongs to the ghost warship “MIS Royal Fortune”.
traits.name: milirathechosenone

traits.description: This Milira devoted a lifetime to tending an exquisitely engineered artificial ecosystem, to the point of overcoming a genetic predisposition that made them poor at communicating with animals.
traits.name: miliraecologist

traits.description:
Since the day this Milira first tried cooking, she has been steadily honing her craft.

She has never once produced toxic food. 

Although the Milira’ exceptional capacity for learning might account for this anomaly, most scholars believe this Milira must have been blessed by the Archotech God.
traits.name: milirageniuschef

traits.description: "I guess you’ve probably figured it out: This Milila isn’t real—he’s more likely a method for breaking the fourth wall."
traits.name: unrealmilira

traits.description:
Timmy has already lost too much on the place where she has spent most of her life—the battlefield. She can no longer bear the pain of having what she loves torn away—whether by her enemies or her own people. 

“Death! Death! Oh, unjust fate—what spiteful malice drives you to force all this upon me? You deny me a calm death in honorable combat, yet compel me to keep fighting while everything I love is taken from me!”
traits.name: miliragreywitch

traits.description: This Milira was favored by the Dark Archotech God Horax and was granted a radically different psionic power.
traits.name: miliradarkchosen

traits.description: This Milila is a mysterious observer who transcends time and space.
traits.name: miliraobserver

traits.description:
During the years she served the Dark Archotech God, Timmy never felt a zealot’s love for her patron. On the contrary, she kept a student’s humility, learning from Horax and steadily honing the powers it had bestowed upon her. 

Perhaps, in the end, Timmy grew tired of being a mere pawn on the Archotech Gods’ board of amusement; she chose to leave Horax and seek another, more intriguing Archotech God.
traits.name: miliravoidwalker

traits.description:
During the years she served the Dark Archotech God, Timmy never felt a zealot’s love for her patron. On the contrary, she kept a student’s humility, learning from Horax and steadily honing the powers it had bestowed upon her. 

Perhaps, in the end, Timmy grew tired of being a mere pawn on the Archotech Gods’ board of amusement; she chose to leave Horax and seek another, more intriguing Archotech God.
traits.name: miliravoidwalker

traits.description: A few hundred years ago, Timmy and Lydia had a fierce, no-holds-barred fight on some unknown planet — or perhaps another dimension, by a twist of fate, the two of them became close friends.
traits.name: flyingjiangshibestfriend

traits.description:
In her youth, Timmy was the beloved Storyteller among the Kiiro children. 

After she left that sorrowful place, somewhere in the galaxy she encountered an Archotech God unlike any other. The Archotech God named Oversleeping said to her, “I favor you—serve as my Storyteller.” From then on, Timmy became a Storyteller. 

(Please have a look and subscribe to my good friend OverSleeping’s Milira story expansion: Wings of Democracy. I promise it’s an unforgettable gem.)
traits.name: milirastoryteller

traits.description:
Timmy is quite possibly the most skilled cook ever recorded in the annals of the Millira Imperium. 

In order to obtain ingredients from dangerous sources, and further shaped by the Imperium’s culture overflowing with martial virtue, she has become not only a celebrated chef across the Imperium, but also a fearsomely powerful psionic warrior.
traits.name: miliraultimategeniuschef

traits.description: In childhood, this Moelotl awakened psychic power far surpassing that of their kin.
traits.name: moelotlthechosenone

traits.description:
Because Timmy grew up on a Kiiro world where people loved handicrafts and machinery, she has always had a passionate obsession with creating and inventing. 

After returning to the Milira Imperium, Timmy graduated from the First Fleet Institute of Science and Engineering in just three years. (For ordinary students, it usually takes fourty years to complete all the coursework and graduate.) 

With outstanding results, she joined the Milira Imperial Engineering Institute after finishing her studies and invented many tools for civilian use. 

Her most widely known invention is the Milira printer gun.
traits.name: milirainventor

traits.description:
"Power brings destruction, will fosters resentment, and prayers bring fortune and misfortune. 

What did it see in the ultimate void? 

When the day comes, she will sound the trumpet of the Apocalypse, negating all things, bringing an eternal end."
traits.name: apocalypticwings

traits.description:
Timmy possesses a degree of psionic talent, and he is able to use certain psionic abilities. 

However, Timmy is still far inferior to true Milira psions, such as the Milira Navigators who can jump an entire starship single-handedly.
traits.name: miliralatentpsion

traits.description: "He is not really kind."
traits.name: kind

traits.description:
Kindseal is equipped with a range of unknown gear, the most noticeable of which is the massive flight pack on his back. 

These devices have been confirmed to be unrelated to Milira technology, and he claims they were all made by his own hands.
traits.name: martialangel

traits.description:
It seems no one has ever seen Kindseal fly using his wings—not even with the simplest flap. Whenever flight is required, he relies solely on his flight pack. 

This Milira is uncanny in every way, making one can’t help but wonder: is he truly Milira?
traits.name: miliraprojection

traits.description: 爻爻获得了某个粉色善意超凡智能的加持。她的肉体强度得到了不可思议的提升，对痛苦的感知已被无尽的快感所取代。
traits.name: 粉色超凡智能的庇护

traits.description: She loves the people of the world, and wishes for rainbow-hued flowers to fall across it.
traits.name: neiyuxian

traits.description: When taking lethal damage or damage that would destroy a body part, if Tempest is above 0, negate the damage, repair all injuries, empty Tempest, and gain brief psychic invisibility.
traits.name: longbreath

traits.description: Qinghe's innate water-spirit protection. Includes Long Breath, Clear Flow, and Lotus Guardian: Long Breath triggers against lethal or part-destroying damage, negating the hit and repairing all injuries; Clear Flow automatically heals 2.5 HP of wounds every 180 ticks; Lotus Guardian provides a regenerating shield whose damage capacity scales with Tempest and whose regeneration scales with Elegance. The shield is disabled for 10 seconds after breaking.
traits.name: waterfairy

traits.description: Timmy is entombed in a mech master warcasket. No amount of pain will have an effect on them, and they can never go into a pain shock or drop unconscious due to pain. Timmy will be unable to do most tasks, except those necessary to maintain and build mechanoids.
traits.name: mechwarcasket

races.description: A baseline human, mostly unmodified by gene engineering and mostly unchanged by evolutionary pressures on non-Earth planets.
races.name: human

races.description: A baseline human, mostly unmodified by gene engineering and mostly unchanged by evolutionary pressures on non-Earth planets.
races.name: human

races.description:
A humanoid species with cat-like ears and cat-tailed limbs, the kiiro race. 

As natives who have lived on this planet for thousands of years, the technology of the kiiros has developed slowly after reaching the medieval level: they always have more things to do than to develop science and technology, such as napping, gossiping, sunbathing and enjoying leisure time. Even when they moved out of their free time to work, they were more than happy to do something related to art. Because of their gentle and non-combative character, their society has always maintained a high degree of harmony and stability throughout their long history, with very few conflicts and disputes, and this has resulted in the fact that although they have the gift dexterous in fighting, they are not good at it. 

But all this began to change when the rough outsiders landed on this planet and got a firm foothold: lack of combat experience and training, technology has not been developed to a great extent, the kiiros appear very powerless in the face of foreign enemy attacks, many villages and towns were attacked and fallen, the survival of the kiiros once fell into a crisis, which forced the kiiros to give up their peaceful life, and set out on a difficult and long road of living. 

However, the invasion of foreign enemies not only spread the war, but also brought the opportunity of technological development to kiiros. With the exposure to the technology brought by the outsiders, the technological level of the kiiros has exploded in a short period of time through introduction and imitation, and the seeds of the industrial age have quietly sprouted within this ancient and backward race......
races.name: kiiro race

races.description:
An ancient species that soars through the skies, the elves of the heavens, known as Milira. Characterized by their pure white wings and the diverse auras that crown their heads, they are often mistaken for angels and have been worshipped by many humans.

      In the distant past, the Milira were strong and warlike. They seemed to be born for battle, relying on their innate combat instincts and superior physical capabilities. They excelled at using swift and fierce close combat, as well as devastating spells to shatter their enemies, thus dominating their realm.
      
      However, after vanquishing all their formidable foes, the Milira gradually lost the meaning of battle. The race needed to find a new purpose for existence. But with their exceedingly long lifespans, the Milira's interest in anything could be worn away by the passage of time, leaving only the unfathomable sea of knowledge that continually drew them to explore.
      
      Gradually, the Milira ceased to yearn for battle and began to pursue knowledge. They collected languages and texts from various races, observed every corner of the world; built floating cities, and established libraries to store their accumulating wisdom. Over time, the combat skills of the Milira were buried deep in the collective memory, covered by layer upon layer of fertile soil called knowledge.
      
      The Milira had a long period of friendly relations with humans and occasionally guided them in the development of science and technology. However, after a certain incident, the Milira became enemies with humans, and the clouds of war gradually enveloped everyone. A conflict seemed inevitable...
races.name: Milira

races.description: A human with rodent-like genes. Although their origins are unknown, it is known to be a monarchy-based society with a strong emphasis on agriculture. There are more females than males, and it can be difficult to distinguish the gender of ratkin when viewed from the outside.
races.name: ratkin
